use_cases: Showcasing developer technical skills in a portfolio or personal website
Displaying tech stack expertise with animated visual flair for recruiters
Creating engaging skill visualizations for tech company landing pages
ai_summary: An animated orbital skills showcase component that displays technology stack icons rotating in two concentric rings around a central code element. Features SVG icons for HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Node, and Tailwind with brand-accurate colors and glow effects. Designed for tech portfolios and developer profiles to present skills in an engaging, visually dynamic manner.
